title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #10, Tama, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get out of here!! There's no time to fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: will be undone by their own hubris!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I know all about it, Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your massive armory in the basement!! stocked with weapons I provided!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now hurry back, Fukurokuju, so we can escape!! This pirate war is no longer any of our business!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Light it all up, Kanjuro!! blow them to smitherens!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The armory is at the very bottom of the castle. I'm not sure I'll make it in time, mononsuke-kun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got to slow the island down, even if it's just by a little!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not used to it yet... I'd only use it if I were near death...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It burns too much energy to use in a real battle!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
